Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: formal attire and halved top hat
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.faction: citizen of Loen Kingdom, Awwa County, City of Tingen; history graduate of Khoy University
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Mentioned picking up his top hat and using a silver-inlaid cane.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: suit of formal clothing, silk hat, and a handkerchief

Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: white shirt, black vest, black trench coat, hat
Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: mid-aged pale male with slightly high hairline and deep gray eyes, always wearing a black top hat and black knee-length Victorian trench coat, carries a tobacco pipe — codename Nighthawk, Church of Evernight dream-walker
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: gray eyes described as deep and hidden in shadow; leads the Nighthawks; references Mandated Punishers, Machinery Hivemind, and other Judiciaries as peer organizations
Dunn Smith.accessories: pipe, golden pocket watch on a golden chain
Dunn Smith.faction: Church of Evernight — Nighthawk Beyonder team
Dunn Smith.era_clothing_lock: black trench coat and halved top hat

Roselle Gustav.face_description: handsome and charismatic face with an air of authority
Roselle Gustav.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, elaborate emperor attire, charismatic and authoritative presence
Roselle Gustav.color_palette: imperial red, gold, white, navy blue
Roselle Gustav.distinguishing_features: Created tarot cards as a public game, but also secretly created a prior set of 22 paper cards encoding the 22 paths of the divine, inspired by the Blasphemy Slate. The Major Arcana tarot cards are a publicly released derivative of these secret originals.
Roselle Gustav.faction: Emperor; creator of the Blasphemy Slate-derived 22-card system and the tarot cards as a gaming cover
Roselle Gustav.role: historical figure — Intis Republic's Consul, later self-proclaimed Emperor Caesar; inventor of the steam engine, tarot divination, and contemporary card game systems; recognized by the God of Craftsmanship; assassinated in year 1198 of the Fifth Epoch at the White Maple Palace by combined forces of the Church of the Eternal Blazing Sun, the Sauron family (former Intis royal family), and aristocrats
Roselle Gustav.source_notes: Alger confirms: 'Emperor Roselle had seen the Blasphemy Slate and that set of paper cards contain the profound mysteries of the twenty-two paths of the divine.' Audrey introduces the claim and Alger validates it.

Wendy Smyrin.age_range: seventies (explicitly stated as seventy-plus years old)
Wendy Smyrin.hair_style: presumably tied back, full head of grayish-white hair
Wendy Smyrin.primary_clothing: modest Victorian dress, perhaps with an apron
Wendy Smyrin.face_description: elderly woman in her seventies with a habitually warm, genial smile; appears lively and humorous despite her age
Wendy Smyrin.visual_anchor: seventy-plus female, completely grayish-white hair, kind wrinkled face with a genial smile, wearing a modest Victorian dress
Wendy Smyrin.distinguishing_features: always wears a genial smile; has sold bread from the same bakery since Klein's earliest memories; known and friendly with the Moretti family
Wendy Smyrin.role: supporting — owner of Smyrin Bakery on the street near Iron Cross Street, sells bread and pastries
Wendy Smyrin.source_notes: Text explicitly states 'seventy-plus year old granny named Wendy Smyrin. Her hair was completely grayish-white and she always wore a genial smile.'

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: decrepit appearance, resembles Klein but lacks a scholarly air
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.distinguishing_features: literate, employed at an import and export company, resourceful and calculating — negotiated gas pipe installation to avoid debt
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Explicitly mentioned wearing a black halved top hat.
Benson Moretti.era_clothing_lock: linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat

Melissa Moretti.skin_tone: pale, slightly thin-faced but with lustrous skin
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage girl, pale thin face with lustrous skin and sharp brown eyes, black hair reaching to the vest, wearing a tattered inherited veil cap, plain Victorian working-class dress with a self-sewn book bag over her shoulder
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.distinguishing_features: Gifted mechanical aptitude — repaired a malfunctioning pocket watch that professional watchsmiths could not fully fix; deeply practical and emotionally reserved
Melissa Moretti.faction: Tingen Technical School — Steam and Machinery department student
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Described holding an old veiled hat, wearing a mended grayish-white long dress, and having black hair that reached down her back.
Melissa Moretti.unique_identifier: tattered inherited veil cap and self-sewn school bag; brown eyes fixed in a habitual expression of calm exasperation toward her brothers

Mr. Gusev.primary_clothing: Brown tweed suit and a black bowler hat
Mr. Gusev.face_description: Practical and direct businessman's expression with a sharp, calculating gaze.
Mr. Gusev.visual_anchor: middle-aged male in a brown tweed suit and bowler hat, typical of a Victorian real estate agent
Mr. Gusev.source_notes: Mentioned in a newspaper advertisement as the person to contact for a rental property.

Mr. Franky.face_description: short and thin gentleman with an excitable, loud demeanor that contrasts his otherwise gentlemanly appearance
Mr. Franky.visual_anchor: short thin pale male landlord in a black Victorian suit with waistcoat and top hat, always gripping a walking stick ready to strike, with an agitated expression and loud voice
Mr. Franky.source_notes: Text explicitly states: 'short and thin gentleman who wore a top hat, a vest, and a black suit' and 'flailing his walking stick and striking the bathroom's door'
Mr. Franky.era_clothing_lock: black suit with waistcoat (vest), black top hat, carries a walking stick
Mr. Franky.unique_identifier: always carries a walking stick which he flails when agitated; short and thin frame with top hat that makes him look taller

Jenny.primary_clothing: faded, worn-out Victorian dress with patches
Jenny.face_description: A thin face with a somber expression, reflecting the hardships of poverty.
Jenny.visual_anchor: teenager female, pale skin, unkempt brown hair, wearing a faded and worn-out Victorian dress
Jenny.color_palette: faded brown, dull grey, dusty white
Jenny.source_notes: Mentioned as a former neighbor who moved to Lower Street due to poverty; visual details are guessed.

Mrs. Rochelle.hair_style: hair tied in a practical, tight bun
Mrs. Rochelle.primary_clothing: Simple cotton house dress in a muted color with a dark, functional apron
Mrs. Rochelle.face_description: Kind and observant mature face, typical of a helpful neighbor in a communal living setting.
Mrs. Rochelle.visual_anchor: middle-aged woman in a simple house dress and apron, appearing as a helpful neighbor
Mrs. Rochelle.source_notes: Mentioned as a neighbor who gives housing advice to Melissa.

Selena.primary_clothing: Victorian modest day dress with simple lace collar
Selena.face_description: Youthful, cheerful face with bright, deep brown eyes.
Selena.visual_anchor: Teenage female, almost 16, wine-red hair, deep brown eyes, cheerful expression, wearing a modest Victorian day dress.
Selena.color_palette: wine-red, deep brown, cream, pastel blue
Selena.source_notes: Described in Klein's thoughts when Melissa mentions her.

Sir Deweyville.primary_clothing: High-end black frock coat, stiff white wing-collar shirt, and a silk cravat
Sir Deweyville.face_description: Distinguished and refined features with a high brow and a stern yet idealistic philanthropic expression.
Sir Deweyville.visual_anchor: elderly distinguished gentleman in a high-end black frock coat and silk cravat, with a look of a wealthy Victorian philanthropist
Sir Deweyville.color_palette: charcoal black, silk white, navy blue
Sir Deweyville.distinguishing_features: Founder of Deweyville Trust; provides cheap housing; incredibly wealthy (doesn't know exact count of 300+ pounds).
Sir Deweyville.source_notes: Identified as the owner of the lost wallet and a respected knight/philanthropist.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Awoken at the end of the Second Epoch. Her full title includes Mistress of Repose and Silence.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Text details her awakening and full titles.

Scarter.face_description: Amiable face with a wide, friendly smile that brightens when encountering potential clients of status.
Scarter.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, amiable smile, wearing a white Victorian shirt and a black vest without a hat or formal coat
Scarter.color_palette: stark white, deep black, warm brown
Scarter.source_notes: Described as a middle-aged man wearing a white shirt and black vest, without formal attire or a hat.
